phases.title: Sprints 1–5 · Foundation
items: DNA concept + 5-dimension scoring rubric · Gemini extraction templates · Neon schema (generation_scores, thompson_weights, thompson_priors)
Thompson Sampling (8 hook arms + 5 framework arms) · POST /api/dna/generate · queue-app routing · DNAFeedbackAggregator (7-day window, 3 AM)
3 DNA pipeline configs · GeminiDNAScorer · 88 category overrides · webhooks · rate limiting
Modularized packages · ≥85% test coverage · Next.js 15 control panel (7 pages)
Foundational docs (architecture, env vars, runbook, API reference, gap-analysis, roadmap)

phases.title: Phase 5 · Performance Feedback Loop
items: TikTok Shop perf ingestion → services/dna-tiktok-performance/src/ingester.ts (1,440 LOC)
dna.performance_feedback writes → services/dna-tiktok-performance/src/repo.ts
GMV-tied bandit reward stream → services/dna-bandit-router/src/reward/kalodata_gmv_live.ts
Bake-window guard inside the tiktok-performance ingester
Kalodata weekly extraction cron → services/dna-kalodata-harvester/, registered in services/dna-cron-registry/
Multi-candidate per chunk → services/dna-candidate-selector/src/selector.ts

phases.title: Phase 6 · Self-Optimization
items: Multi-variant orchestrator + credit assignment → services/dna-genco/src/credit-assigner.ts
Off-policy evaluation (DR-IPS) → services/dna-ope-estimator/src/dripss.ts
Vision reward scaffold → services/dna-vision-reward/src/scorer.ts (interface + in-memory; HTTP scorer is a TODO placeholder — see Phase 7)
SaleNet GMV prediction → services/dna-salenet/src/predictor.ts
Cross-category transfer → services/dna-arm-embedder/, services/dna-brand-priors/, services/dna-category-promotion/
Variant batch orchestration → services/dna-variant-batch/

phases.title: Phase 7 · Autonomous Operation
items: Vision reward HTTP scorer wiring (Gemini-backed) — replace InMemoryVisionRewardScorer default
Live rewards UI page in services/dna-canary-ui/ streaming dna.performance_feedback
GMV reward HTTP scorer on by default in dna-bandit-router
Cross-shop priors persisted in Neon (dna.arm_priors)
OPE → dna-rollout-controller auto-promote/demote
GenCO credit-assignment dashboard · Cron registry observability · Brand-priors scheduled refresh · Vision reward backfill

phases.title: Phase 8 · Cross-Platform Expansion
items: Meta Reels extraction (adapted prompts, Reels metrics)
YouTube Shorts extraction (different audience dynamics)
Platform-specific DNA profiles + unified comparative dashboard

phases.title: Phase 9 · Monthly Retraining & RLHF
items: Automated fine-tune pipeline for ScriptSage on latest DNA data
RLHF on top of dna-vision-reward once HTTP scorer is wired
Monthly retraining triggered from dna-cron-registry

topGaps.title: Vision reward HTTP scorer wiring —
topGaps.detail: Replace InMemoryVisionRewardScorer default with Gemini-backed HttpVisionRewardScorer in services/dna-vision-reward/.

topGaps.title: GMV reward on by default in bandit-router —
OPE → rollout-controller automation —
topGaps.detail: dna-rollout-controller consumes OPE outputs to promote/demote.

topGaps.title: Cron registry observability surface —
topGaps.detail: Last-run / next-run / error per job in the control panel.

topGaps.title: Brand-priors → bandit-router scheduled refresh —
topGaps.detail: Periodic refresh job; new cron in dna-cron-registry.

topGaps.title: Vision reward historical backfill —
topGaps.detail: One-shot backfill once HTTP scorer lands.

topGaps.title: GMV Max deployment write-back —
topGaps.detail: Auto-deploy multi-variant outputs back to GMV Max.
